title: ModelRouteRevision
description: An immutable, publishable revision of a model route (spec §27.6, E13 T8): the model id and the connection that redeems it. A draft never steers a run; publishing makes it the project's routed target. The routing fields are never rewritten — a revise INSERTs a new revision. A thin projection (e.g. a publish acknowledgement) may omit the fields it did not read back.

model.description: The model id placed on the provider wire.

published.description: Whether this revision is the project's routed target.
